response.justification: Candidate has strong geospatial domain experience as founder of GISCollective and high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic, but the core requirement of modern C++ (or Rust) is barely represented — only a brief 2014–2015 stint with C/C++ at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis. Recent work is TypeScript/Node and DLang, neither of which substitutes for production C++ in a routing tile pipeline. A screening call could verify whether DLang systems work translates into current C++ fluency.
strengths: Founded and maintains a geospatial GIS platform (GISCollective), directly relevant domain
Distributed/high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/s, async I/O, caching)
Senior-level breadth across backend, Linux, and systems-oriented languages (DLang)
concerns: Minimal modern C++ experience; last meaningful C/C++ role was ~10 years ago and brief
No Rust experience and no navigation/routing pipeline background
Recent stack is TypeScript/Node/AWS — far from the C++ Linux server profile required
